title: linum squamulosum subsp. tommasinii
intro: Linum squamulosum subsp. tommasinii, also known as Tommasini's woolly flax, is a subspecies of the Linum squamulosum plant, which is a type of flowering plant in the flax family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Linum squamulosum subsp. tommasinii include its ability to soothe skin irritations, reduce inflammation, and promote wound healing, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. Herbal preparations of Linum squamulosum subsp. tommasinii typically involve infusions, decoctions, or tinctures made from the plant's leaves and flowers, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
